title: Agentic Search Credibility
useCase: Rank people or sources for retrieval, search infrastructure, source triage, and research-agent discovery.
viewSignalRole: Contextual. Views matter when the goal is public influence or consumer search behavior; primary retrieval expertise matters more for correctness.

evalFixtures.name: Jo Kristian Bergum
evalFixtures.why: Known retrieval/search practitioner; a high exemplar when correctness depends on IR fundamentals rather than popularity.

evalFixtures.name: Han Xiao
evalFixtures.why: High exemplar for dense retrieval and search/retrieval systems in the local Worldsfair graph.
